title: centaurea regia
intro: Centaurea regia, also known as the Mountain Cornflower, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Centaurea regia include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Herbal preparations of Centaurea regia can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to alleviate coughs, colds, and other respiratory ailments.
